summary: CRITICAL OMISSIONS: Deliverable missing labeler.test.ts (referenced in workflow, not provided), test fixtures (fixtures/default/), act integration harness to create act-result.txt (explicitly required), and actionlint validation step. TypeScript code is solid (good types, error handling, glob implementation), but workflow is incomplete and untestable. Workflow has duplication (cli.ts invoked twice in verification step, fixture dir logic not DRY), magic marker strings (LABELS_BEGIN/END), and no proof of functionality. Cannot ship: task requires all tests via act with captured results; no test infrastructure exists.
